raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta tappe wiſſa ta KUN-
GA Kalpoichana tai Deenâ pa-
darrita / pee Paſſa · Swehtku
Turretchanas / un Dedsamo-
Uppuru Uppurefchanas us ta
KUNGÂ Altari/ ittin ka tas
Kehniſch Josijus to bij paweh-
lejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Iſraëta Behrni /
kas atrasti tappe/ turreja tohs
Paſſa-Swehtkus tai Laika/ un
to neraudsetu Maisu Swehtkus
feptinas Deenas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl ne bija tahdi Paſ-
fa-Swehtki eekſch Iſraëta turre-
ti no ta Praueeta Samueta
Laika / un niekahdi Iſraëta Keh-
nizi bij tahdns Paſſa-Sweht-
kus turrejſchi/ itt ka Josijus tur-
reja / ar teem Preesteercm / un
Lewiteem/ un wiſſu Juhdu un I-
fraëlu/kas atrasti tappe/ un teem
Jerusalemes Eedſihwotajeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Astoțâ padeſinitâ Gaddâ
tahs Waldifchanas Josijus/ tap-
pe ſchee Paſſa-Swehtki turreti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz ſcho wiſſu/ kad Jo-
sijus to Nammu bij ſataitijs /
tad nahze Nekus tas Egiptes
Kehniſch augſcham/karroht prett
Karkemiſu pee tahs Uppes Wrat.
Un Josijus iſgahje tam pretti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas fuhtija Wehſt-
neſchus pee winna/ un ſazzija:
Kaſ man ar tewi jadarra tu keh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Josijus ne nowe-
sahs no ta/ bet wiſſch pahrge-
bahs ar winnu karroht /
winsch ne klaufija Nekus Wa-
deim no Deewa Muttes/un na-
ze ar winnu kantees eekſch ta
Ecletjas Megiddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee Strehtneeki ſcha-
we to Kehniſu Josiju / un t
Kehniſch fazzija us ſaweem Ka-
peem: Weddeet manni nohſt/
es efimu tohti eerainohts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nozehle winna Ra-
to no teem Ratteem / un wed-
to us winna ohtreem Rattee-
un tee nowedde to us Jerusale-
un tas mirre/ un tappe eet
fawu Tehwu Kappeem aprak-
un wiſſ Juhda un Jerusale-
schehlojahs pahr Josiju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jeremijus darrija u-
nu Randa-Dseetmu pahr Jo-
jn/ ir wiſſi Dseedataji un Da-
datajas runnaja fawas Rau-
Dseefnas pahr Josiju/ lithdsfo-
deen/ un eestahdja to par wee-
Likkuu eekſch Iſraëta / un ra-
at/ tahs irr ſarp tahm Rau-
Dseefmahin rakſtitas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Josi-
Leetahm atteek/ un winna Sch-
lastiba/ itt ka ta KUNGÂ Ba-
libâ rakſtihts irr.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
